title: HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: COLUMBIA RIVER HEALTH HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Primary care community clinic. Services include general medical care, immunizations, annual exams, PAP tests, STD screening, contraceptive services, sports participation physicals, CDL physicals, and help applying for OHP and private insurance through the federal health exchange. Also coordinates dental, eye screening, and mental health care services for low-income patients. 450 Tatone Street Boardman, OR 97818 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 481-5444 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 481-5444 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or an appointment. Walk-ins for acute care needs only. FEES: Accepts Medicaid (OHP), Medicare, most private insurance plans, and offers payment plans and sliding scale fees based on household income and size DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Morrow County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm, Saturday 8am-noon Services: Behavioral Learning Therapy Birth Control Counseling Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Contraception Eye Care Flu Vaccines General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Navigator Programs Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sports Participation Physical Examinations Vaccine Information Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DENTAL CARE REFERRAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLUMBIA RIVER HEALTH
